Text.Page:
I used to be a great pirate. I pillaged all day and drank all night. But then I lost my lucky ship key, and...I don't know, I just haven't felt the same since.

I guess I've lost the spark. People tell me, "You don't need a key to be a pirate, Finn." That's all fine and good, but...there's just no passion anymore.

I suppose if I found the key again, I might feel different. That would almost seem like a sign, don't you suppose?

Wow! It is a sign! I didn't even mean for you to...what I mean to say is, I never suspected...

Wow! Thank you. I can feel the spark returning already.
It was a stunning metallic color, too, my key.
